metadata.description: Challenges validating FormatRegistry detection by extension, content, and filename

challenges.name: Extension-Based Detection for All Formats
challenges.description: Verify FormatRegistry.detectByExtension correctly identifies all supported file extensions across 17 text formats

outputs.name: detection_results
outputs.description: Map of extension to detected format ID

assertions.message: All extensions must be correctly detected

challenges.name: Content-Based Detection: LaTeX
challenges.description: Verify detectByContent identifies LaTeX documents by \documentclass, \begin{document}, \section patterns

assertions.message: All LaTeX samples must be detected as latex

challenges.name: Content-Based Detection: Org-mode
challenges.description: Verify detectByContent identifies Org-mode documents by #+TITLE, * heading, TODO patterns

assertions.message: All Org-mode samples must be detected as orgmode

challenges.name: Content-Based Detection: CSV
challenges.description: Verify detectByContent identifies CSV data by comma-delimited patterns with consistent column counts

assertions.message: All CSV samples must be detected as csv

challenges.name: Content-Based Detection: R Markdown
challenges.description: Verify detectByContent identifies R Markdown by YAML front matter with output field and ```{r} code chunks

assertions.message: All R Markdown samples must be detected as rmarkdown

challenges.name: Format Detection Priority Ordering
challenges.description: Verify that R Markdown is detected before Markdown, and more specific formats take priority over general ones

outputs.name: priority_results
outputs.description: Map of content to detected format showing priority resolution

assertions.message: Priority ordering must be correct for all ambiguous samples

challenges.name: Filename-Based Detection Edge Cases
challenges.description: Verify detectByFilename handles dotfiles, multi-dot filenames, files with no extension, and case sensitivity

outputs.name: detection_results
outputs.description: Detection results for each filename edge case

assertions.message: All filename edge cases must be handled correctly

challenges.name: Shared Extension Resolution
challenges.description: Verify getFormatsByExtension returns multiple formats for shared extensions like .txt (plaintext, todotxt, creole, textile)

outputs.name: format_lists
outputs.description: Map of extension to list of matching format IDs

assertions.message: Shared extension results must not be empty
